content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges: [(0, 1, 0), (1, 2, 1), (0, 2, 2), (3, 7, 2), (4, 5, 2), (5, 8, 2), (3, 5, 5), (3, 8, 5), (2, 4, 7), (1, 6, 9), (1, 3, 16), (6, 9, 16), (5, 7, 18), (7, 9, 18), (0, 2, 21), (2, 5, 21), (7, 8, 24), (6, 7, 25)], we need to find when node 7 and node 5 are first connected.

We will scan each edge and collect the time t whenever u and v match the two queried nodes (in either order).

1. (0, 1, 0) - Time 0
2. (1, 2, 1) - Time 1
3. (0, 2, 2) - Time 2
4. (3, 7, 2) - Time 2
5. (4, 5, 2) - Time 3
6. (5, 8, 2) - Time 4
7. (3, 5, 5) - Time 5
8. (3, 8, 5) - Time 6
9. (2, 4, 7) - Time 7
10. (1, 6, 9) - Time 8
11. (1, 3, 16) - Time 9
12. (6, 9, 16) - Time 10
13. (5, 7, 18) - Time 11
14. (7, 9, 18) - Time 12
15. (0, 2, 21) - Time 13
16. (2, 5, 21) - Time 14
17. (7, 8, 24) - Time 15
18. (6, 7, 25) - Time 16

The final answer is: 16

Answer: 16
